ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the crime was committed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime type */,
  "occurrences" INTEGER /* Number of occurrences of the crime */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime was committed */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the crime was committed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the crime was committed */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect(s) involved in the crime */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime was reported */,
  "incident_number" TEXT /* Unique incident number assigned by the police department */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the crime was committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" INTEGER /* Month the crime was committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)
